economic_ownership_map.label: Steel mills through-cycle value
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Nucor FY2025 results and segment operating statistics.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Normalize shipments, spread, utilization, maintenance capital, and tax across a full steel cycle rather than capitalizing 2025 or spot margins.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Downstream steel products
economic_ownership_map.evidence: FY2025 steel-products pretax income of $1.229bn and product-volume disclosures.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Value downstream earnings separately using normalized backlog, margins, and maintenance capital.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Raw materials and recycling
economic_ownership_map.evidence: FY2025 raw-materials pretax income of $153m; commodity and outage normalization pending.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Use through-cycle DRI, scrap, and brokerage economics after sustaining capital.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Net debt and lease claims
economic_ownership_map.evidence: FY2025 cash/investments of $2.699bn and debt/lease obligations of $7.121bn.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Deduct all debt and finance leases net of cash and short-term investments; range reflects required operating liquidity.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: New-project ramp and replacement-cost optionality
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Management identified new rebar, melt-shop, towers, and coating projects; project-level invested capital and returns remain to be reconciled.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Credit only probability-weighted after-tax cash returns above the cost of capital, net of remaining spend and ramp losses.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Supply-response and downcycle reserve
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Steel is cyclical and exposed to global capacity, imports, and new domestic supply.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Explicitly deduct for margin mean reversion, supply response, and projects earning below their cost of capital.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

method_route.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Steel mills through-cycle value
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Normalize shipments, spread, utilization, maintenance capital, and tax across a full steel cycle rather than capitalizing 2025 or spot margins.

top_value_drivers.label: Downstream steel products
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Value downstream earnings separately using normalized backlog, margins, and maintenance capital.

top_value_drivers.label: Raw materials and recycling
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Use through-cycle DRI, scrap, and brokerage economics after sustaining capital.

top_value_drivers.label: Net debt and lease claims
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Deduct all debt and finance leases net of cash and short-term investments; range reflects required operating liquidity.

top_value_drivers.label: New-project ramp and replacement-cost optionality
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Credit only probability-weighted after-tax cash returns above the cost of capital, net of remaining spend and ramp losses.

blockers: industry_capacity_map: Map domestic and global additions, closures, imports, replacement costs, and the likely supply response by product.
net_debt_and_leases: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
new_project_ramp: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
project_roic: Reconcile project-level invested capital, remaining spend, ramp curves, incremental returns, and overlap with normalized segment earnings.
raw_materials: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
steel_mills: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
steel_products: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
supply_response_and_downcycle_reserve: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
through_cycle_segments: Reconcile segment shipments, spreads, utilization, maintenance capital, tax, and mid-cycle earnings over multiple cycles.

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Capacity, normalized margins, supply response, replacement cost, and low-case liquidity.
